Catalog/ENT/Noszel ENT Epistaxis Surgical Sponge
👂 ENT SolutionsREF: MRL-NSL-001

Noszel ENT Epistaxis Surgical Sponge

Noszel · Surgical Consumables

Sterile, single-use PVA surgical sponge designed for effective management of nasal and ear bleeding. Offers superior fluid absorption for controlling oozing and persistent bleeding in ENT procedures.

MaterialPolyvinyl Alcohol (PVA)
Frequently Asked Questions

Sterile, single-use PVA surgical sponge designed for effective management of nasal and ear bleeding. Offers superior fluid absorption for controlling oozing and persistent bleeding in ENT procedures.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Noszel ENT Epistaxis Surgical Sponge, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Noszel ENT Epistaxis Surgical Sponge is constructed using Polyvinyl Alcohol (PVA), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
